title: GOOD: MLS Welcome only accepted from online[0] (admin) in CLI and TUI
description: Both cli/src/commands.rs and tui/src/event.rs WHISPER_DELIVER handlers only accept MLS Welcome messages from online[0] (the sequenced admin — lowest sequence number in the directory). Any Welcome from a non-admin is silently dropped. This prevents a rogue peer from injecting a forged Welcome that would install a group state under attacker control. The check is essential for MLS admin-based group bootstrapping security.
